summary: Phase 2 AI Memory - All features verified working. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows tested successfully via Playwright.

minor.issue: Added missing patterns for 'intolerante a la lactosa' and 'comer más sano' to improve preference detection coverage

passed_tests: DELETE /api/ai/memory - Reset all preferences
GET /api/ai/memory - Returns empty after reset
PUT /api/ai/memory - Update diet preferences
PUT /api/ai/memory - Update allergies
PUT /api/ai/memory - Update goals
PUT /api/ai/memory - Update budget
GET /api/ai/memory - Returns full profile with all fields
Chat detects 'soy vegano' and stores vegan diet
Chat detects 'soy vegetariano' and stores vegetarian diet
Chat detects 'dieta keto' and stores keto diet
Chat detects 'alergia a los frutos secos' and stores nuts allergy
Chat detects 'intolerante a la lactosa' and stores dairy allergy
Chat detects 'celíaco' and stores gluten allergy/diet
Chat detects 'perder peso' and stores weight_loss goal
Chat detects 'comer más sano' and stores healthy_eating goal
'qué sabes de mi?' returns memory summary (Spanish)
'what do you know about me?' returns memory summary (English)
'olvida mis preferencias' resets memory (Spanish)
'forget my preferences' resets memory (English)
'vaciar carrito' still clears cart (Phase 1 compatibility)
'añade todo' still adds products from session memory (Phase 1 compatibility)
AI uses stored diet preference without asking again
AI considers allergens in recommendations
critical_code_review_comments: AIProfile model properly extended with preferred_country, preferred_currency, preferred_formats fields
GET/PUT/DELETE /api/ai/memory endpoints implemented correctly with proper authentication
Memory commands (query_memory, forget_memory) handled directly without LLM call - efficient

Automatic preference detection for diet (vegan, vegetarian, keto, halal, gluten_free), allergies (nuts, dairy, gluten, shellfish, soy), and goals (weight_loss, healthy_eating, muscle_gain, more_energy)
Preferences automatically saved to DB and used in subsequent LLM calls via personalization_context
Phase 1 cart actions (add_all, clear_cart) remain intact and working
Minor fix applied: Added 'intolerante a la lactosa' and 'comer más sano' patterns for better detection coverage
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 AI Memory fully tested and working. Key implementation: 1) AIProfile model in server.py stores user preferences (diet, allergies, goals, budget, etc.). 2) GET/PUT/DELETE /api/ai/memory endpoints for CRUD operations. 3) Memory commands in chat ('qué sabes de mi?', 'olvida mis preferencias') handled directly without LLM. 4) Automatic preference detection from chat messages using pattern matching. 5) Preferences used in LLM context via personalization_context. 6) Phase 1 cart actions still work. 7) Frontend has Hispalo AI preferences page at /dashboard with UI for setting preferences.

get_ai_memory.details: GET /api/ai/memory returns user's stored preferences with has_memory flag, memory_items list, and raw_profile object

put_ai_memory.details: PUT /api/ai/memory updates specific fields (diet, allergies, goals, budget, etc.) with upsert

delete_ai_memory.details: DELETE /api/ai/memory resets all preferences to defaults

chat_preference_detection.details: Chat automatically detects and stores diet (vegan, vegetarian, keto), allergies (nuts, dairy, gluten), and goals (weight_loss, healthy_eating) from user messages

chat_memory_query.details: 'qué sabes de mi?' and 'what do you know about me?' return memory summary

chat_memory_reset.details: 'olvida mis preferencias' and 'forget my preferences' reset all memory

ai_uses_preferences.details: AI uses stored preferences in recommendations without asking again

phase1_cart_actions.details: Phase 1 cart actions (add them all, clear cart) still work correctly
